relabelled_senses.definition: Referring to the present time or contemporary era; used to comment on conditions or attitudes characteristic of modern times (commonly used in the phrase 'in this day and age').

literal: no literal meaning
happening every day
a playful or lively activity during the daytime
a day that is especially important or celebrated
at any time during the 24-hour day
a short trip or outing lasting one day
a time long ago
an unintended silence during a broadcast
in a very deep sleep
a father who neglects his children
a brief recovery in price or performance

relabelled_senses.definition: Exactly in the middle or at the precise central point of something; perfectly centered.

literal: no literal meaning
a person or thing that is irreparably damaged or doomed

relabelled_senses.definition: A literal dead fish or, figuratively, a person or limb that is limp, motionless, or lacking physical energy.

literal: no literal meaning

relabelled_senses.definition: An obvious sign, clue, or piece of evidence that reveals a fact, identity, or the truth about something.

literal: no literal meaning

relabelled_senses.definition: A race or competition in which two or more competitors finish at the same time, resulting in a tie.

literal: no literal meaning

relabelled_senses.definition: Finishing or placed in the very last position in a race, competition, ranking, or sequence.

literal: no literal meaning
a total financial loss with no prospect of recovery
possessions or position left behind by someone who has died
the darkest and quietest part of the night
